# PavoPDF

> Free, open-source, offline PDF toolkit for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

PavoPDF is a desktop application that processes PDFs entirely on your computer. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. MIT licensed.

## Key Facts
- Price: Free (forever)
- License: MIT (fully open source)
- Platforms: Windows (.msi/.exe), macOS (.dmg), Linux (.AppImage/.deb)
- Technology: Tauri 2 (Rust backend) + Svelte 5 (frontend)
- Tools: 25 PDF tools across 5 categories
- Privacy: All processing is local. Files never leave your computer.
- GitHub: https://github.com/mrrcelino/pavopdf
- Website: https://pavopdf.com
- Download: https://pavopdf.com/download

## Tool Categories
- Organise: Merge, Split, Compress, Rotate Pages, Reorder Pages, Remove Pages
- Convert from PDF: PDF to Word, PDF to Excel, PDF to PowerPoint, PDF to Image, PDF to PDF/A
- Convert to PDF: Word to PDF, Excel to PDF, PowerPoint to PDF, Image to PDF, HTML to PDF
- Edit: Edit Metadata, Add Watermark, Add Page Numbers, Redact
- Security & Repair: Password Protect, Unlock, Sign, OCR, Repair

## Detailed Tool Documentation
See: https://pavopdf.com/llms-full.txt
